messages.content: spawn a car, tree, house, and a dog
[car][tree][house][dog]
give me some starter models: couch, television, plant, rug, table
[couch][television][plant][rug][table]
i want to build a forest scene. throw in rocks, boulders, pine trees, bushes, logs, and mushrooms
[rocks][boulders][pine_trees][bushes][logs][mushrooms]
can I get a sword, shield, helmet, and armor
[sword][shield][helmet][armor]
add a computer, keyboard, mouse, mug, desk
[computer][keyboard][mouse][mug][desk]
dump a bunch of beach items like sand, ocean, towel, umbrella, crab, seashell
[sand][ocean][towel][umbrella][crab][seashell]
street assets: lamp, bench, fire_hydrant, car, bicycle
[lamp][bench][fire_hydrant][car][bicycle]
let's start with a base character body, hair, shirt, pants, shoes
[body][hair][shirt][pants][shoes]
add some space stuff: astronaut, rocket, planet, moon, asteroid, satellite
[astronaut][rocket][planet][moon][asteroid][satellite]
can you drop a burger, fries, drink, and ketchup into the viewport
[burger][fries][drink][ketchup]
kitchen assets needed: stove, fridge, microwave, sink, pan, plate, fork
[stove][fridge][microwave][sink][pan][plate][fork]
i'm making a graveyard scene, load up a tombstone, coffin, skeleton, gate, fence, ghost
[tombstone][coffin][skeleton][gate][fence][ghost]
load up standard testing shapes: cube, sphere, cylinder, torus, cone
[cube][sphere][cylinder][torus][cone]
spawn a cat, bird, fish, hamster
[cat][bird][fish][hamster]
dungeon room starters: torch, chest, spikes, door, key, barrel
[torch][chest][spikes][door][key][barrel]
gimme a guitar, drum, piano, microphone, amplifier
[guitar][drum][piano][microphone][amplifier]
city skyline assets: building, road, traffic_light, billboard
[building][road][traffic_light][billboard]
add a hat, glasses, jacket, backpack
[hat][glasses][jacket][backpack]
